title: 菊花賞の後に・白い大輪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this year's Kikuka Sho, the chrysanthemums
bloom late, and their petals are neither golden
nor pink—they're a brilliant white.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Bwahaha! Didja see dat?! Dat's what I'm talkin'
about! I don't even need to be da toughest!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: With these guts, I can win any race I want! From this day on, ya can all call me "Ritto's Not-So-Secret Weapon"!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Wait a second. That sounds pretty lame. Hm,
what would be better?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aaah, you're right! I almost forgot!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Thanks a bunch, everyone! The name's Tamamo Cross—I'm the racer formerly known as Ritto's Secret Weapon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I guess she couldn't come up with another
nickname in time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After the awards ceremony...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Winning's a big deal and all, but there's somethin'
else really worth celebratin'...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I just got the full 3,000-meters Kyoto experience!
I saw it with my own eyes, and ran it on my own
legs. The hills, the curves, the last stretch... I even
got to know how rough that last part is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross continues muttering to herself as
we stand on the track. Looks like she had her own
reasons for running this race.
choice_data_list: Why did you really want to join this race?
Why did you really want to join this race?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, that's personal. Ya know how it is, I got
certain circumstances. But I guess I could tell ya...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time for a pop quiz! When it comes to
long-distance G1 races in Kyoto, there's the
Kikuka Sho aaand... Fill in the blank!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give it a think. The example that comes to mind
is...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ding-ding. Some say that the spring Tenno Sho is
the best race out there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And my dad's one of 'em!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Haha, ya could say he's obsessed. But when a
race's got so much history, you're bound to get
some fanatics.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But in any case, that's my goal. I want him to see
his little girl runnin' in his favorite race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's why I took the risk 'n ran this race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross grins through her exhaustion. It
looks like this race was actually a form of
preparation, planned with her family in mind.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Tamamo...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Congrats on winning the Kikuka Sho. Hard to
believe it's over, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey there, City. Ya certainly didn't make it
easy for me! But thanks to you, this ended up
bein' a pretty good year.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Our talk about food before the Classic Triple
Crown really changed the way I thought about
stuff.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're the reason I'm standin' here today. Thanks
a lot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm just as grateful for you... Your resilience gave
me the courage to push on.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Even when we weren't running together, I still felt
like we were in the same race. That feeling never
went away...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Really? Well, I guess that's the perk of competin'
in the same year. We get each other on a whole
'nother level from our juniors or seniors.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And ya know, I got loads of pals 'n rivals now...
but I'm real glad you're one of them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having reached the end of the Classic Triple
Crown, the two set off on their respective
journeys. Only time will tell what their senior
years will bring.
